name: Buzlok
description: Mark your targets and unleash a barrage of bullets, the Buzlok's homing rounds always find the enemy. Marked targets are more likely to take critical hits.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Mark your targets and unleash a barrage of bullets, the Buzlok's homing rounds always find the enemy. Marked targets are more likely to take critical hits.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Detonite Injector
components.description:
Detonite injectors are the basis for explosive and incendiary weapons.

Location: Clan Research (Chem Lab in the Dojo) and Grineer Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed script error related to the Buzlok.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue where Buzlok’s fire homing would cause no damage.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Buzlok Alt Fire homing causing most shots to deal no damage.
Fixed Buzlok Alt Fire homing darts tagging Sisters as “KUVA LICH Agor Rok” and Hound as “[HC] Lawyer Pet”.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Buzlok's scope HUD overlay not extending to the edge of the screen, leaving visible margins. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1238209-buzlok-sniper-scope-overlay-bug-ps4/

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Changed the Buzlok’s projectile launch to appear slightly below the scope when aiming.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Buzlok scope not maintaining square pixel aspect ratio.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to fire the Buzlok without triggering to fire.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted Buzlok's +50% crit chance with Beacon attached to Additive instead of Multiplicative as intended

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Javlok, Buzlok, Ferrox, Harpak, Hind, Mutalist Quanta, Penthera, Paracyst, Penta, Quanta (Vandal), Stradavar, Tenora, Zarr
The Buzlok and its homing mechanism has been used for many creative moments

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Update 1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the duration of Buzlok's alt fire projectile in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Buzlok’s projectiles not properly homing in to hit enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed the Buzlok’s tracer shot being slightly off center.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Burston, Opticor, Miter, Hind, Grinlok, Marelok, Twin Gremlins, Tiberon, Tetra, Buzlok, Attica, Vasto, Seer and Supra are now available for use in Conclave.  This list includes all weapon variants.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Buzlok and Twin Gremlin being unable to equip Terminal Velocity or the Lethal Momentum Mods.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with Buzlok Rifle shots not adding damage to an ally using Nyx's Absorb.
Fixed the Buzlok's homing projectiles having strange bounce angles when using punch-through mods.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue where swapping shoulders with the Buzlok resulted in the projectile embedding to the right of the reticule, where the unswapped reticule was aiming.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.8.1
patchlogs.additions: Added audio cues to the Buzlok homing mechanism for when a ‘lock’ is initiated and a ‘lock’ is lost.
patchlogs.changes: Buzlok homing beacon hit effect updated to not cause blood/shield visual effects as it does no damage, therefore no effects need exist.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.7.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed multi-shot mods causing Buzlok to fire an extra homing beacon.
Fixed Buzlok's homing beacon firing from wrong position when using scope sights.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.7.3 + 14.7.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with client fire accuracy on the Buzlok.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.7.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Buzlok Homing Beacon is now a silent projectile.
Adjusted equipped position of Buzlok.
Fixed an issue where Buzlok can cause player to do diving jump animation when not zoomed in.
Fixed a Buzlok issue where beacons would not always destroy when target died.
Fixed the Buzlok homing beacon not replicating properly on Client.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.7.0: Operation Gate Crash!
patchlogs.fixes: New Buzlok! An advanced Grineer Rifle equipped with specialized homing rounds, always capable of finding their mark.
